title: ClearMap
description: This plugin is free and lets you clear the map in your server between 2 coordinations and in what world incase you use multiverse-core.
body:
🧹 **ClearMap** 

Clearmap is a simple plugin that clears all blocks between two configured coordinates at a timed interval. It works automatically based on values you define in config.yml

**Features**:
Clears a region defined by two positions (corner1, corner2)

World selection for multiverse compatibility

You can change in how much time it clears the map

Supports block exclusions via do_not_clear list

Works with the TAB plugin's scoreboard with %clearmap_time% placeholder. The placeholder shows in how much time the map clears.

Most of the things are in config.yml, but you can do /clearmap reload to reload the config.yml without needing to restart your server.
